name: gpt-realtime-slides
description: A customizable, manual-first presentation runtime with optional silent OpenAI Realtime voice controls.

scripts.check: node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core/controller.js && node --check src/core/renderer.js && node --check src/realtime/client.js && node --check server/realtime-token-server.mjs
